__prompts__.module_slug: Python module name (auto-derived from package_slug; rarely override)
__prompts__.backend_name: Display name of the backend (e.g. Pinecone)
__prompts__.backend_label: Short config key users put in astrocyte.yaml (e.g. pinecone)
__prompts__.spi_family: Which SPI Protocol does this adapter implement?
__prompts__.astrocyte_min_version: Minimum astrocyte version this adapter supports
